recommendations.title: Horizon: An American Saga - Chapter 1
recommendations.overview: In 1859, families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

recommendations.title: Day of Anger
recommendations.overview: A scruffy garbage boy becomes the pupil of famed gunfighter Talby, and the stage for confrontation is set when the gunman overruns the boy's town through violence and corruption.

recommendations.title: The Quick and the Dead
recommendations.overview: A mysterious woman comes to compete in a quick-draw elimination tournament, in a town taken over by a notorious gunman.

recommendations.title: Cat Ballou
recommendations.overview: A woman seeking revenge for her murdered father hires a famous gunman, but he's very different from what she expects.

recommendations.title: My Name Is Nobody
recommendations.overview: Jack Beauregard, an aging gunman of the Old West, only wants to retire in peace and move to Europe, but a young gunfighter known as "Nobody" who idolizes Beauregard wants him to go out in a blaze of glory. So, he arranges for Jack to face the 150-man

recommendations.title: The Killer
recommendations.overview: In lawless badlands, reclusive Cabeleira sets out to discover the fate of his gunman father and grows to be a feared assassin himself.

recommendations.title: Brimstone
recommendations.overview: In the menacing inferno of the old North-American West, Liz is a genuine survivor who is hunted by a vengeful preacher for a crime she didn’t commit.

recommendations.title: Diablo
recommendations.overview: A young civil war veteran is forced on a desperate journey to save his kidnapped wife.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Last Shoot Out
recommendations.overview: Soon after a newlywed learns that her husband had her father shot down, she flees from the Callahan ranch in fear. She's rescued by a gunman who safeguards her at a remote outpost as he staves off her husband's attempts to reclaim his bride.
